passives.name: ZZ'Rot
passives.effects: Basic attacks [[on-attack]] and damaging abilities against enemies summon 8 allied {{ui|Voidmite|Voidmites}} that are {{tip|untargetable}} and attack the target (12 second cooldown). {{ui|Voidmite|Voidmites}} deal {{as|6|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 4% of your AD)}} {{as|(+ 8% of your AP)}} {{as|magic damage}} with each of their basic attacks and last for up to 3 seconds. Additionally, summon 6 {{ui|Voidmite|Voidmites}} upon your death.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks and damaging abilities summon 8 allied Voidmites that attack the target (12s cooldown).
Voidmites deal 6 (+4% AD) (+8% AP) magic damage per attack.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: ZZ'Rot periodically spawns allied Voidmites from qualifying basic-attack or damaging-ability events, with a shared cooldown.
Player-visible behavior: spawned Voidmites are untargetable temporary attackers with short lifetime and per-attack scaling damage.
Page notes include clone-on-death spawn behavior and visual-state details (hidden health bar/transparency); visual details are documented but not modeled as combat-state mechanics.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 1000 / sell 400).
